name: Fuuka Miyazawa
description: Fuuka is a former idol. She gave up her dream and left for Okinawa on her way back to her hometown. There, she met Kukuru. Fuuka is a serious and hard worker. She is also sensitive to the feelings of others.

Though he is young, his skills on the battlefield are extraordinary and is frequently shown besting men much older than himself. Also, infrequently displays a childish nature. description: Kouda's daughter. She is four years older than Rei. Beautiful and hot tempered, Kyouko seems to hold a grudge on Rei as she has the habit of exercising a negative influence on him by discouraging him on purpose before his official matches.

The way she acts can be compared to a typical American teenage girl, only way more elegant and refined. name: Riku Nanase
description: __Height:__ 173 cm Riku Nanase has a cute and energetic disposition that belies how frail his body actually is. Despite that, he works hard to do what he can do, and doesn’t want to be a burden to others. Due to living most of his early life in and out of hospitals, there’s a lot Riku doesn’t quite know about the world, and his naivety often shows itself because he wears his heart on his sleeve.

name: Ritsu Sakuma
description: __Unit:__ Knights __Club:__ Tea Club __Circles:__ FLAVOR, CRAFTMONSTER In the daytime it's hard to get his engine going, so Ritsu is often found napping in all sorts of places. He goes at his own pace and is relaxed, but can say some cutting things when he thinks quickly. His singing voice is like a sweet whisper, and his performances flow languidly. name: Teresa Wagner
description: A student from the European country of Luxembourg. She is a beautiful girl with blonde hair and bright, jade-like green eyes. She has a bubbly and honest personality, and always has a bright smile on her face. She loves a Japanese historical drama called "Rainbow Shogun" and even though she is really good with Japanese, she sometimes ends up using samurai language. She is living together with Alexandra, who is also a fellow exchange student and they also like to spend a lot of time together. ~!

name: Terumi Afuro
description: __Teams__: Zeus, ~!Raimon (Aliea Gakuen arc), Fire Dragon, Kidokawa Seishuun (Coach, GO series)!~ He is a midfielder and the captain of Zeus.

name: Belldandy
description: Belldandy is unflinchingly kind, patient, and warm, not only to Keiichi but to everyone, without exception. However, this does not mean that she is to be taken lightly; Belldandy is licensed as a goddess first-class, unlimited, and as such is highly skilled. Her power is so great, in fact, that she is required to wear a special earring on her left ear which constantly seals the full brunt of her magical strength. name: Yashiro
description: The matchmaker in Don't Stay Gold and the protagonist of Tadayoedo Shizumazu, Saredo Naki mo Sezu and its sequel Saezuru Tori wa Habatakanai, Yashiro is a sadomasochist who feels the need for people to view him in an obscene light. Through his somewhat cheerful facade lies a broken man with a past of abuse and feels no inclanation to fix his emotional detachment with people. name: Yulia Niguredou
description: __Height:__ 140cm An aspiring spirit medium who believes she's somewhat special because she has the power to see spirits. However, she doesn't know that she can only see lesser spirits, and misinterprets [Miko](https://anilist.co/character/139631)'s attempts to protect her from the greater dangers she cannot see as acts of malice.

name: Zorome
description: __Height:__ 161cm Zorome is a former Parasite with the codename "666" of the Thirteenth Plantation, where he is partnered in a boy-girl pair with [Miku](https://anilist.co/character/124384/Miku) to pilot a FRANXX called Argentea. Aside from being the most immature member of the squad, he is the most loyal to the adults and APE, and his long-reaching goal is to become an adult himself. name: Jean Havoc
description: Second Lieutenant Jean Havoc likes to smoke, and is almost always pictured with a cigarette in his mouth. He is a fair shot with a gun, and one of Roy Mustang's loyal followers; he gives Edward a stern talking-to when Ed bad-mouths Mustang for only caring about promotions. Havoc is a strict man of duty, a very by-the-book soldier, even if he doesn't always agree with the orders. ~!He becomes paralysed from the legs down due to a wound given to him by Lust.!~

name: Kaito Momota
description: __Height:__ 184cm (6'0") __Talent:__ Ultimate Astronaut A student in the Ultimate Academy for Gifted Juveniles and a participant of the Killing School Semester featured in _Danganronpa V3: Killing Harmony_. His title is the Ultimate Astronaut (超高校級の宇宙飛行士 lit. Super High School Level Astronaut). He is voiced by [Ryouhei Kimura](https://anilist.co/staff/96762/Ryouhei-Kimura) in Japanese and [Kyle Hebert](https://anilist.co/staff/95336/Kyle-Hebert) in English. description: __School:__ Kaimei High School __Class:__ 2-C (chapters 1-209); 3-C (chapters 210-288) __Affiliation:__ Sket Dan Switch is the brains and secretary of the Sket Dan. As a result of the events that happened in his life, he opts to speak through a voice synthesizer on his computer. He has a deadpan sense of humor and seems to enjoy teasing others. Because he always communicates through speech synthesis software and has a tendency to joke with a straight face, it is difficult to tell what he is real

name: Kishirika Kishirisu
description: Kishirika Kishirisu is The Great Empress of the Demon Realm. She is the demon empress known for her demon eyes' powers and the ability to bestow others with demon eyes. She is engaged to [Badigadi](https://anilist.co/character/262620/Badigadi), the demon lord of immortality. __Light Novel Volume 4 Spoiler__ ~!Kishirika Kishirisu is the person that is responsible for giving [Rudeus](https://anilist.co/character/88348/Rudeus-Greyrat) his demon eye, among other favors!~

name: Makoto Konno
description: Makoto Konno is an ambivalent senior high school student still caught between that devilish question of "Arts or Sciences?" that her teachers require of her immediate academic future. She always sleeps in a few minutes too many, is remarkably clumsy, hates pop quizzes like every other high school student and never really makes an effort to brush her wayward hair. About as average as can be, she spends the majority of her days after school hitting baseballs and playing catch with her best pals.

name: Shun
description: Perhaps the most reluctant of the bronze saints, Shun is the official Bronze Saint of the Andromeda constellation. He is a merciful soul by nature, and a firm believer in solving problems without causing bloodshed. This creates a sharp contrast between himself and the rest of the Saints: Whereas they will not hesitate to battle when the situation demands it, Shun only allows himself to fight if it's an absolute necessity, or when his almost endless patience wears off.
